titleStmt.title: SII 29.120: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 120. (A.R. No. B. 817 of 1962-63.) GŌGĒBĀḶ, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying by the side of the path leading to the field of Kawtal Sivappa.

This highly damaged record belongs to reign period of [Kalachūri] Rāyamurāri Sōvidēva described as Kāḷanjara puravarādhīśvara (lord of the city of Kāḷanjara). It mentions vīrabaṇanjudharma, nānādēsis, seṭṭiguttu, mummuri-daṇḍas, nakhara, Aruvattokkalu [a group of 60 landed property] etc. Perhaps all these together made some grant of income from tax to a god [name lost] and also to the sthānika Chavuḍa of the place. Also it seems to record an additional gift of 31 haṇa per month [probably arising out of the tax collected] to the same god.
It is dated Śaka 1097, Jaya, Mārggaśira, huṇṇime. It corresponds to 1174 A.D., November 10, Sunday. Lunar eclipse occured on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga
mara cāravē trailō
mūla staṁbhāya (śaṁbhavē)
svasti samasta bhuvanā
llabha mahā kāḷāṁjara pu
ravarādhīśvara
rāyamurāri sōvidēva vijayarā
Āya muttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamāna mā
na mire sakavarṣa
1097 neya jaya saṁvatsarada mārggaśira
puṇnami vāra
worn out
© svasti
śāsana labdhānēka guṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita satya śau
cācāra cāritrya nayavinaya saṁpanna vīra
baṇaṁju dharmma
kramōnnatarumappa śrī maḍamada nānādē
si seṭṭiguttu mumuridaṁḍagaḷuṁ nakhara
Aṟuvattokkalu ta śrī mā
dēvargge ko
ṭṭalli yarekāṇi māṟu koṁḍalli yare
kāṇi Alliya sthānika cavuḍa
māyavarggakke dēvakāryya
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harētu vasuṁdhara
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi . hejjuṁkadadhikā
E ṁ kara tiṁgaḷiṁga ha
ṇa 31 llidēva
Digital edition of SII 29.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
